title: elatostema goudotianum var. maevaranense
intro: Elatostema goudotianum var. maevaranense is a variety of the Elatostema goudotianum plant, a species of flowering plant in the Urticaceae family, commonly known as nettle family. This plant is native to Madagascar and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Elatostema goudotianum var. maevaranense include treating various ailments such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as providing relief from digestive problems and skin infections. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the leaves in hot water or extracting the active compounds using solvents like ethanol or glycerin.
